import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { ObservableInputTuple, SchedulerLike } from '../types'; export declare function concat<T extends readonly unknown[]>(...inputs: [...ObservableInputTuple<T>]): Observable<T[number]>; export declare function concat<T extends readonly unknown[]>(...inputsAndScheduler: [...ObservableInputTuple<T>, SchedulerLike]): Observable<T[number]>; //# sourceMappingURL=concat.d.ts.map
